title: IssueTypeScreenSchemeDetails
description: The details of an issue type screen scheme.

description.description: The description of the issue type screen scheme. The maximum length is 255 characters.

issueTypeMappings.description: The IDs of the screen schemes for the issue type IDs and *default*. A *default* entry is required to create an issue type screen scheme, it defines the mapping for all issue types without a screen scheme.

name.description: The name of the issue type screen scheme. The name must be unique. The maximum length is 255 characters.
